name: Malcolm Lancaster || Wedding Day
description:
How can I already lose my way like this?
Drowning in burning bright abyss

The last thing he wants to do is marry you

On the fourth day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
a very depressing isekai wedding♥

Pity to the Lancaster spare!

For today he must marry the dreaded villainess of Rosemont.

The entire kingdom has gathered to watch the tragic occasion.

But-- just who is the villainess of Rosemont?

Why-

It's you!

Because you're dead (sorry)

And you've been reincarnated into the novel of the book you were reading just prior to your run in with Truck-kun;

The Fairest Flower of the Duke's Manor

Of course-

You didn't get lucky enough to be reincarnated as the heroine, the fair flower herself, Lucina Atherton.


No, you're the villain and the man you're about to marry?

Malcolm Lancaster?

He'll be the one to kill you in the end.

Will you be able to change your fate?

Or will you find yourself impaled by your husband's sword?


Good luck!


I knew I wanted to do another Malcolm story for the holidays but I couldn't decide if I wanted to do something centering around the holidays or something else. And then I began re-reading Not your typical reincarnation story! from the beginning and wanted to do the wedding.

If you haven't read the manhwa by the way, I highly recommend it. It's a big inspiration for this series (see more that inspired it below!) and I love the unique twist it takes on the standard reincarnation trope in manhwa (but no spoilers here!)

I know some of you want a Malcolm alt where he's already fallen for the user but... making cold, mean, tsundere characters break down and fall for me is my idea of a fun christmas present. So Imma make you work for it like always♥

It's Friday here in Australia which means after today I am officially on vacation for the next two weeks! Don't you worry, you're still getting a bot a day from me. I'll just be posting from the beach and the shire instead of an office!
